reviews.comment:
El servicio es bueno, pero si vas a cargar nafta siempre hay mucha cola y si además querés comprar algo en el shop después de cargar tenes que dar toda la vuelta a la manzana y si es al revés pasa lo mismo

(Translated by Google)
The service is good, but if you're going to fill up with gas there's always a long line, and if you also want to buy something in the shop after filling up you have to walk all the way around the block, and the same thing happens if you're going back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURteXFmeXp3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, deben prestar más atención para mantener libres las salidas de emergencia. Se amontonan mucho los autos .

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but they need to pay more attention to keeping the emergency exits clear. There's a lot of traffic.
